# Experiment Template — Shamir Lab

## 1. Experiment Title
Short descriptive title.

## 2. Objective
What is the purpose of this experiment?

## 3. Hypothesis
What do you expect to observe?

## 4. Methodology
- Tools used
- Parameters
- Dataset
- Steps to reproduce

## 5. Execution Log
Document commands, outputs, anomalies.

## 6. Results
Summaries, tables, plots, observations.

## 7. Analysis
Interpretation of results, unexpected behavior, edge cases.

## 8. Conclusions
What did we learn? What should be tested next?

## 9. Artifacts
- Logs
- Evidence files
- Screenshots
- Reports

## 10. Notes
Any additional comments or follow-up ideas.
